summary: Populate the partner-scoped sync registry, fix cursor double-encoding, and add dependent reservations/rooms sync.
reason: Every Sutra path is scoped under /{partnerId}/, so the generator emitted empty sync registry functions (syncResourcePath/defaultSyncResources/knownSyncResourceNames/resourceSupportsPagination), defaulted the wrong cursor param, and produced no dependent-resource iteration; the URL-encoded pagination.nextStartAfterId cursor was also double-encoded by the client query builder, capping sync at one page.
validated_outcome: Live sync pulled 34,523 records across 7 resources (incl. 22,143 per-class reservations) with 0 errors.
